title: Create: Bronze Age
description: Explore new possibilities with revolutionary bronze technology!
body:
Explore new possibilities with a bronze-based add-on to the Create mod, featuring new resources, tools, and contrived recipes!

Dive into the world of molten metalworking to forge these new components, and delve into the caves to mine for the tin needed to make this new alloy.

- Same warning as Create: In order to be able to see all recipes required in Create: Bronze Age, consider installing JEI. The vanilla recipe book will not be able to guide you through the experience by itself.

Join the discord here: https://discord.gg/HJ7y6C7pRy
